specific_question: During fiscal year 2024, what customer relationship management (CRM) software did the customer service team use?
answer: During fiscal year 2024, the customer service team used Zendesk for ticketing and Salesforce Service Cloud for customer data management, with licenses costing $42,000 annually.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
